extra.message: Hardcoded credentials (usernames and passwords) found in USERS_XML variable.

cwe: CWE-798: Use of Hard-coded Credentials

extra.message: Passwords are stored in plaintext in the database instead of being securely hashed.

cwe: CWE-259: Use of Hard-coded Password

extra.message: User input from params['id'] is concatenated directly into the SQL string passed to cursor.execute(). This allows SQL injection.

cwe: CWE-89: SQL Injection

extra.message: User input from params['v'] is injected directly into HTML content via re.sub, leading to Reflected XSS.

extra.message: Untrusted user input from params['object'] is deserialized using pickle.loads(), allowing Remote Code Execution.

extra.message: User input from params['path'] is passed directly to open() and urllib.request.urlopen(), causing Path Traversal and SSRF.

cwe: CWE-22: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')
CWE-918: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)

extra.message: User input from params['domain'] is concatenated directly into an OS command executed with shell=True, allowing Command Injection.

cwe: CWE-78: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection')

extra.message: User input from params['xml'] is parsed as XML with external entities explicitly enabled (resolve_entities=True), allowing XXE attacks.

cwe: CWE-611: Improper Restriction of XML External Entity Reference

extra.message: User input from params['name'] is formatted directly into an XPath expression, leading to XPath Injection.

cwe: CWE-643: Improper Neutralization of Data within XPath Expressions ('XPath Injection')

extra.message: User input from params['size'] is used to control loop iterations and memory allocation directly, leading to Denial of Service.

extra.message: User input from params['comment'] is formatted directly into an SQL INSERT statement. This allows SQL injection.

cwe: CWE-352: Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF)

cwe: CWE-98: Improper Control of Filename for Include/Require Statement in PHP Program ('PHP Remote File Inclusion')
CWE-918: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)
